schema_version.description: 1 = historical (pre-UTV2-1526 model-routing compatibility rework); 2 = current, written by createManifest for every newly created lane. This is the real Codex model-routing compatibility boundary -- NOT model_routing's presence/absence. See the allOf conditionals below and scripts/ops/shared.ts's LANE_MANIFEST_CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION doc comment.

executor.description: Distinct from lane_type in the current (post-canonical-lane-type) manifest shape; scripts/ops/shared.ts is authoritative for the exact relationship.

p0_protocol.description: P0 Runtime Hardening merge protocol fields (UTV2-948). Set when the lane's issue is in the P0 project. Truth-check H-checks consume these fields.

model_routing.description: Deterministic Codex model-profile decision (UTV2-1526). Codex-only. Required on a schema_version-2 Codex-executor manifest (deleting it fails validation); optional/legacy on schema_version-1; forbidden on any Claude-executor manifest. See docs/05_operations/policies/codex-model-routing.json.

verification_target.description: The UTV2-### issue this verification lane produces proof for (UTV2-1533). Required on a schema_version-2 lane_type:"verification" manifest (deleting it fails validation); optional/legacy on schema_version-1; forbidden on any other lane_type, at any schema version. Backs the per-target Verification concurrency cap in docs/governance/CONCURRENCY_CONFIG.json's type_caps.verification.max_per_target.

planning_model_routing.description: Fable 5 pilot planning/review model decision (UTV2-1569). Claude-only -- forbidden on any Codex-executor manifest, at any schema version (inverted from model_routing's Codex-only rule). Always OPTIONAL, unlike model_routing: the ordinary case (no Fable involvement) simply omits this field. See docs/05_operations/policies/fable-pilot-policy.json and docs/05_operations/LANE_MANIFEST_SPEC.md §17.

allOf.description: schema_version 2 + Codex executor requires model_routing (the deletion-attack fix from PM review finding #2 -- this is documentation of the same rule scripts/ops/shared.ts#validateManifest enforces at runtime; this JSON schema is not itself run through an AJV validator anywhere in this repo today).
A Claude-executor manifest must never carry model_routing, at any schema version.

schema_version 2 + lane_type:verification requires verification_target (UTV2-1533 P2 fix -- same deletion-attack shape as model_routing above; scripts/ops/shared.ts#validateManifest enforces this at runtime, this schema documents it).
A non-verification-type manifest must never carry verification_target, at any schema version.
A Codex-executor manifest must never carry planning_model_routing, at any schema version (UTV2-1569, inverted from model_routing's Claude-forbidden rule).
